name: WhisperTranscriber_v1_faster
description: High-performance Whisper transcription class leveraging the faster-whisper engine. Includes sophisticated hardware detection (VRAM/RAM auditing) to safely choose between CUDA and CPU. Optimized for both performance (float16) and compatibility (int8). Supports various input formats including paths and numpy arrays.
test_code:
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
import numpy as np

def test_transcriber_init():
    transcriber = WhisperTranscriber()
    assert transcriber.model is None

def test_hardware_info():
    transcriber = WhisperTranscriber()
    info = transcriber.get_hardware_info()
    assert "ram" in info
    assert "vram" in info
